card_description: Jesus Christ is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 8 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Jesus Christ. Context: "Dick bridges his personal experience with the "regression of things" in *Ubik*, proposing that the universe is a "mutually hallucinated" world where humans are "half-alive" (in cold-pac) being roused by the Savior’s voice."
